issues.description: register_typed_session_start appends the verification entry but does not increment the runtime totalSessions, so _build_sessions_array truncates the appended session on the next boundary write.
issues.verificationMethod: Ran the writer against a 2-session fixture, then re-read via normalize_to_v4_shape and observed the appended entry dropped.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: test_typed_session_grows_total_sessions: assert len(sessions[]) increases by one and survives a subsequent close.
issues.resolution_notes: Writer now derives the new count from len(sessions[]) and validates before writing.

issues.description: The example fixture should prove a minimal envelope with bare verifier issues (no promoted or resolution_* fields) is still valid; this issue carries only the verifier-emitted fields.
